name: Mercurial Scimitar

active.name: Quicksilver
active.effects: Removes all {{tip|crowd control}} debuffs (except {{tip|Airborne}}) from your champion and grants {{as|50% '''bonus total''' movement speed}} and {{tip|ghosted|ghosting}} for 2 seconds.

effects_structured.raw: Removes all crowd control debuffs except Airborne.
Gain 50% bonus total movement speed and ghosted for 2 seconds.

simpleDescription: Activate to remove all crowd control debuffs and grant massive Move Speed

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Quicksilver is a self-activated cleanse with no cast time that removes most crowd-control effects (including suppression and nearsight) while excluding airborne effects.
Player-visible behavior: activation can be used while stealthed without breaking stealth, cannot be used while airborne, and movement-speed plus Ghosting apply immediately for 2 seconds.
Follow-up note: page notes indicate Quicksilver-group cooldown does not transfer between items and this should be mirrored in runtime item-group cooldown handling.
Wave 129 (2026-02-25): Backfilled explicit fixed-cooldown active execution timing metadata (`cast_windup_seconds`) for Quicksilver cleanse and movement-speed active branches.
